creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

This is very unlikely to be fixed. 

Although portmgr indeed has requested that people stop committing new 
patchfiles with the "::" separators, there remain hundreds of existing 
ones.  IMHO it would be very disruptive to the ports tree -- and thus, 
most users -- to do a mass rename just to handle this particular FAT 
edge case. 

I'll mark this PR suspended as a caution to committers considering adding 
new patchfiles with that separator.
